{"query":"President Droupadi Murmu article Jagannath devotion spiritual experiences childhood full text July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1831,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://ddindia.co.in/2026/07/pm-modi-shares-president-murmus-article-recounting-her-faith-in-lord-jagannath/","title":"PM Modi shares President Murmu's article recounting her faith in Lord Jagannath - DD India","content":"Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Thursday shared an article written by President Droupadi Murmu in which she reflects on her lifelong devotion to Lord Jagannath, recounting how faith in the deity has guided her through personal challenges and public life.
Droupadi Murmu Ji traces her lifelong devotion to Mahaprabhu Jagannath, from childhood memories to the spiritual experiences that have shaped her life.” He noted that President Murmu writes about the grandeur of the Rath Yatra and the faith that continues to guide her on her journey in the service of the people.
The article offers personal account of President Murmu’s spiritual connection with Lord Jagannath, beginning with her childhood in Uparbeda village in Odisha’s Mayurbhanj district.

Last updated on: 18th July 2026","date":"2 days ago"},{"url":"https://www.devdiscourse.com/article/headlines/3951457-president-murmus-spiritual-journey-a-devotion-to-lord-jagannath","title":"President Murmu's Spiritual Journey: A Devotion to Lord Jagannath | Headlines","content":"1 day ago — President Droupadi Murmu shares her enduring devotion to Lord Jagannath, marking it as a source of strength throughout her life.
In her article titled "On the Grand Road of Puri," she shared these personal experiences, emphasizing how the deity has been an enduring pillar of support."},{"url":"https://www.bignewsnetwork.com/news/279192090/president-murmu-pens-on-rath-yatra-recounts-lifelong-devotion-to-lord-jagannath-recalls-emotional-barefoot-walk-to-puri-temple","title":"President Murmu pens article on Rath Yatra; recounts lifelong devotion to Lord Jagannath, recalls emotional barefoot walk to Puri temple","content":"1 day ago — Droupadi Murmu has shared a deeply personal account of her lifelong devotion to Lord Jagannath, describing the deity as her constant source of ...
Recalling cherished childhood memories, her first darshan in Puri, and the emotional barefoot walk along the Bada Danda after assuming office as President, she said she has always felt the divine presence of Mahaprabhu Jagannath and remains committed to serving the nation under His blessings.
In the article titled 'On the Grand Road of Puri,' the President recalls her childhood memories of singing bhajans dedicated to Lord Jagannath and describes how her faith in Mahaprabhu has remained a constant source of strength throughout her life.
This year's Rath Yatra - the 149th Rath Yatra - began on July 16, and the nine-day festival will conclude with the Bahuda Yatra on July 24."},{"url":"https://thenewsmill.com/2026/07/president-murmu-recalls-lifelong-devotion-to-lord-jagannath-in-rath-yatra-article/","title":"President Murmu's devotion to Lord Jagannath during Rath Yatra","content":"President Murmu highlights the special significance of Rath Yatra, noting that the festival marks the occasion when Lord Jagannath, along with Lord Balabhadra, Devi Subhadra and Sudarshan, emerges from the temple to bless devotees on the journey to the Gundicha Temple.
She recalled offering prayers at the Shree Jagannath Temple in Delhi’s Hauz Khas on the day of Rath Yatra before filing her nomination papers and feeling the deity’s presence during her oath-taking.
Reflecting on her visit to Puri in November 2022 after assuming office, President Murmu describes an overwhelming spiritual experience when she stopped her motorcade and walked barefoot on the Bada Danda with her gaze fixed on the temple’s Neel Chakra and Patit Paawan Dhwaj."},{"url":"https://www.pib.gov.in/PressReleasePage.aspx?PRID=2285313","title":"Prime Minister shares the President's article recounting her ...","date":"2 days ago","content":"2 days ago — Droupadi Murmu Ji traces her lifelong devotion to Mahaprabhu Jagannath, from childhood memories to the spiritual experiences that have shaped ...Read more"}]}
